docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KNOX, DAMON MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KNOX, DAMON MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 02/24/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $200 SERVED MAR-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAMON MICHAEL KNOX IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUBHI BARAKAT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNOX, DAMON MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
